title: Asaru Defense Site
description: A defensive position with interceptor assets. Used in simulation to model automated assignment of interceptors against incoming drone swarms.

id.description: Unique site ID. Format: DS_{conflict}_{seq}. e.g. DS_UA_001

name.description: Human-readable name. e.g. 'Kyiv North Interceptor Base'

assets.description: Weapon systems deployed at this site

type.description: Category matching interception_methods in attack_event schema

stock.description: Number of rounds/interceptors available at start of engagement

range_km.description: Maximum effective engagement range in km

speed_kmh.description: Interceptor speed in km/h. Relevant for drone-on-drone engagements. Null for stationary systems.

reload_time_s.description: Seconds between launches from same launcher. Null if single-use or N/A.

kill_probability.description: P(kill) by target drone type at optimal range

can_discriminate_decoys.description: Whether this system can distinguish strike drones from decoys before engagement

radar_range_km.description: Detection range of the site's radar. Determines when incoming drones become visible to the assignment algorithm.
